creator: jarrod@burbank.downtools.com.au
text:
The checksum and expected file sizes of both the HTML and PDF versions of the
Subversion book are incorrect, suggesting an update by the author.

Fix: Patch correcting the ports distinfo is attached.
http://www.downtools.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/devel-subversion-1.7.0_1-distinfo.diff
 
How-To-Repeat: bender# cd /usr/ports/devel/subversion
bender# make clean
bender# make WITH_BOOK=
